overview: This image features a Bighorn Sheep (Ovis canadensis) interacting with a Black-billed Magpie. The magpie perches on the sheep's back or head to eat ticks and other insects from its coat, a mutually beneficial relationship. In cold winter conditions, the bird may also use the sheep's body heat for shelter.
